label: Microsoft Azure Administrator Complete Course (Exam AZ-104)
description: Microsoft Azure Administrator Complete Course (Exam AZ-104) is a comprehensive study notes course for IT certification prep that combines Azure cloud theory, hands-on Azure Portal, Azure CLI, and PowerShell labs, and real-world enterprise scenarios aligned to the latest Microsoft Entra ID naming and 2026 Azure services. It covers every AZ-104 domain in depth—identity and governance, storage, compute, networking, and monitoring—with exact commands, free-tier/sandbox labs, topic-by-topic FAQs, scenario-based exam traps, and practical exercises like deploying a fault-tolerant web app across two regions.
